prestazioni: Installation of a **Koenigsegg-developed 5.0L twin-turbo V8 (engine code: TFG V8 2.7L + 2.3L hybrid)** with reinforced forged internals, including **Carrillo H-beam connecting rods** and **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons** (9.5:1 compression ratio), paired with **Garrett GTX5544R Gen II turbos** (custom billet compressor wheels, 106mm inducer) and **Tial MV-R 60mm wastegates** for 35 psi peak boost targeting **1,650+ hp on E85** (1,280+ hp on 95 RON).

Full **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management with **Koenigsegg FlexFuel 2.0** sensor integration, custom **3D-printed titanium intake plenums** (optimized for 1,200 CFM airflow), and **NGK R8993-10 Iridium Racing Spark Plugs** (0.018" gap) for sustained 9,000 RPM operation. **Pectel SQ6M+ data logger** for real-time telemetry and adaptive ignition timing maps.

**Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers** with **Koenigsegg-specific valving** (24-click rebound, 22-click compression), **TWR carbon-ceramic brake rotors (420mm front, 395mm rear)** with **AP Racing CP9450 calipers**, and **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (345/25 R21 front, 385/20 R22 rear)** mounted on **Dymag Assetto Magnesio wheels (21x11.5" front, 22x13" rear)** for sub-2.0s 0-60 mph acceleration.
estetica: **Koenigsegg Ghost Aero Package** (carbon-fiber underbody diffusers, active rear wing with **30° attack angle**, and **Vortex Generators** on the A-pillars) for **1,800 kg downforce at 250 mph**, coated in **PPG Vibrance Collection "Liquid Silver"** with **3M Scotchlite 980CR retroreflective flakes** for thermal management.

**Rocket Bunny x Koenigsegg** widebody conversion (carbon-fiber fenders with **120mm front, 150mm rear extensions**), **Seibon Carbon hood** with **dual central NACA ducts** (feeding the **Garrett turbos**), and **custom LED headlights** (Osram Ostar Projection Modules) with **DRLs integrated into the front splitter**.

**Brembo GT-Racing** titanium brake caliper covers (anodized **Koenigsegg Ghost Orange**), **Forge Motorsport** carbon-fiber engine cover with **laser-etched Jesko Absolut script**, and **Recaro Pole Position** seats (carbon-Kevlar shell, **Schroth 6-point harnesses**) upholstered in **Bridge of Weir Nappa leather with Alcantara suede inserts**.
